message:
Review and improve plan beads: structured Design/Acceptance/Logging fields

- 51 beads improved with structured Design Notes (alien CS refs + Rust guidance),
  Acceptance Criteria (5-7 testable conditions each), and Logging requirements
- Covers all 9 epic families + 9 standalone alien concept beads
- Zero dependency cycles
